title: [GRAY ZONE] TX AG v. Anzu: lawsuit frozen 45+ days, no response filed
detail: Texas AG lawsuit filed Feb 18, 2026 — no responsive pleading in 45+ days. XTI Aerospace filed multiple 8-Ks but none mention lawsuit. FY2025 10-K overdue. Potential SEC disclosure gap.

title: [GRAY ZONE] XTI pivoting to distribution — Anzu next-gen unlikely near-term
detail: Zero evidence of Anzu next-gen: no name, specs, patents, jobs. XTI $160M+ guidance from Drone Nerds distribution. XTIA ~$2.08, current ratio 0.49. Unusual Machines silent.

title: [GRAY ZONE] FCC blanket ban rendered shell company strategy obsolete
detail: Dec 2025: ALL foreign UAS added to Covered List. Last shell auth: Lyno Dynamics Nov 28, 2025. First 4 Conditional Approvals March 2026: SiFly, Mobilicom, ScoutDI, Verge.

title: [GRAY ZONE] SkyRover at Best Buy despite DJI infrastructure — FCC auth active
detail: SkyRover at Best Buy March 2026, $629. DJI FlySafe URLs in app. FCC auths (April 2025) still active. Exploring US manufacturing for Conditional Approval.

title: [GRAY ZONE] DJI challenges FCC ban — Ninth Circuit Case 26-1029
detail: DJI filed Feb 2026 arguing FCC exceeded authority, violated Fifth Amendment. FCC moved to dismiss. Outcome determines whether blanket ban holds.

title: [GRAY ZONE] New York becomes 7th state to restrict Chinese drone procurement
detail: A2237/S3259 signed Dec 2025, effective 2027. Total: 7 states (FL, AR, MS, TN, NV, CT, NY). TX HB 41 stalled. MO blocked.

title: [GRAY ZONE] Florida: Blue UAS 95% sensor reduction, 3-14x replacement cost
detail: $200M grounded, $25M for replacements. Broward: 63→3 drones. Palm Beach: 100→5 missions/mo. Skydio battery fire. DOI: 95% sensor reduction. No federal compliance audit.
